title: Monthly Eva and Monthly Eva RE magazines
display_title: Monthly Eva and Monthly Eva RE magazines
wikitext:
[]: Monthly Eva and Monthly Eva RE magazines             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 09, 2009 10:19 am I mentioned this in another thread but it probably needs it's own thing for people to notice. While browsing Amazon Japan last night I noticed this magazine series (what seems like this is at least). Apparently it's not Eva Extra but something else. The latest Issue is here (currently it's up for pre-order. There's also a magazine called Monthly Eva RE...is it just Chronicle being reissued? Since I haven't seen this thing before, I have no idea how it's similar or different to Eva Extra, but I thought it was worth pointing out (espeically if anybody else knows more about it).

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 09, 2009 11:51 am In a flood of blog updates on that Minna No Eva fan site, some info about this was posted: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-456.html Apparently it's a magazine you can only get at convenience stores. The magazine (or at least this issue???) is about the latest Pachinko game with Kaworu (the thing that has Kaworu and Eva-04 doing Operation Yashima). This issue has a sticker of Shinji saying "I mustn't run away! (nigecha dameda!)", and the next issue with Asuka will have an "Are you stupid? (anta baka?)" sticker. Related to that update, these are Revoltech figures being released based on the game: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-440.html

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat May 09, 2009 12:53 pm Thanks for the post, SSD. I was really wondering about the content of those magazines. Wonder how many pages they have each. I just bought four of those, hoping I'd get some Kaworu images. I didn't get the Shinji one, but seeing those images makes me think I should have!

[]: Re: Monthly Eva and Monthly Eva RE magazines             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 09, 2009 1:11 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: There's also a magazine called Monthly Eva RE...is it just Chronicle being reissued?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat May 09, 2009 1:37 pm So THAT'S what that is. Thanks for pointing that out, Reichu.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sat May 09, 2009 8:57 pm Yeah, I've seen these a few times at Kinokuniya. They were about $15 AUS so I didn't want to buy them as I had no idea what they were.

[]:             Quote Post by Kazi » Sat May 09, 2009 11:55 pm Woo, a Rebuild Revoltech Unit 04! On a semi-related note, do we know when are you going to be able to preorder the Revoltech 3.0 Evas?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 10, 2009 12:13 am Kazi wrote: Woo, a Rebuild Revoltech Unit 04!

[]:             Quote Post by Kazi » Sun May 10, 2009 12:25 am I meant the "Revoltech 3.0" reboot, which includes the "Rebuild 2.0" figures, not the "Rebuild 3.0" ones. You're probably right about the Unit 04 figures...seeing as there is now...5...Unit 01's (original, glow-in-dark, Rebuild 1, Rebuild 2, and miniature), I wouldn't doubt that there could be 3 Unit 04's. But there haven't been any announcements for "Rebuild 2.0" Unit 00, Unit 04, or Unit 06, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 10, 2009 12:43 am Kazi wrote: But there haven't been any announcements for "Rebuild 2.0" Unit 00, Unit 04, or Unit 06, right?
